message:
fix(ui): add missing framer-motion import to war-story-card

The WarStoryCard component uses `motion.h3` (line 60) for interactive
hover color transitions on the story title, animating from white to
the red accent color (#ef4444) on hover. However, the component was
missing the required `import { motion } from "framer-motion"` statement.

This adds the import to match the component's actual runtime dependency
on framer-motion's motion primitives, consistent with the same fix
applied to optimization-card.tsx in the previous commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
